name: Bacon Avocado & Cheese Omelets with Tomato Sa
recipeIngredient: 1 Pickled or fresh jalapeno chili (seeded and minced)
3 Slices of lean bacon, cooked and crumbled
1 small Avocado, peeled and chopped into half-inch cubes
1/2 cup Coarsely grated Monterey Jack cheese (about 2 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, stir together the finely chopped tomato, red onion, jalapeno, coriander, and lime juice until combined well.
2. Add salt and pepper to taste, then mix until well incorporated.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs, water, and salt and pepper until smooth.
4. Heat 1/2 teaspoon of butter in an 8-inch skillet over moderately high heat until foam subsides.
5. Pour half of the egg mixture into the skillet, tilting it to spread evenly over the bottom.
6. Cook for 1 minute or until set, then sprinkle with half the bacon, avocado, Monterey Jack, and remaining salsa.
7. Continue cooking for 1 more minute or until set.
8. Fold the omelet in half and transfer to a plate.
9. Repeat steps 4-8 with the remaining butter, egg mixture, ingredients, and cheese.
10. Serve the omelets with the tomato salsa on top. Serves 2 (or 3 if desired).
